creator: swear@aa.net
text:
The "install" chapter refers to "install.bat" and "makeflp.bat" files
without saying where they may be found.  I suppose they were once on
the install CD, but they are not on my 4.3-RELEASE and so I further
suppose that they were removed on purpose and the handbook needs
updating.

================

Fix: 

Probably, further research should be done to determine whether the
files are SHOULD be on the CD before changing the handbook.
How-To-Repeat: n/a
================
